title: Fortcraft Survival Royale
description: Adding the Fortnite Island & Items into Minecraft
body:
This mod adds Fortnite into Minecraft. 

It includes a new Dimension, a Giant Sky Island that is meant to represent the Fortnite Island Map. It also includes various weapons, items, and mobs that are from Fortnite. Like the Scar Assault Rifle, Chug Jugs, and even Loot Llamas!

If you are a fan of Fortnite and Minecraft. And want to spice up the combat it Minecraft. Then this mod could be for you!

*For Minecraft Forge 1.20.1*
